name: Synup OS
highlight_text: Best Suited For: Mid-sized Marketing & Advertising Agencies
description:
__POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__

What Synup Does

Synup is an agency operating system that includes a prospecting product (Synup Leads) engineered for SMBs and local businesses. Synup’s AI and prospect search filters let agencies discover local businesses and surface marketing gaps (e.g., missing listings, low review scores) to craft high-intent outreach. The OS combines prospecting with delivery apps (listings, reviews, social) and finance features, enabling a handoff from lead to sale and then to delivery inside one platform.

Synup OS treats SMB prospecting as step one of a client lifecycle, not the finish line.

Instead of just contacts, every SMB comes with a live digital audit:

  • GBP status
  • Review volume & sentiment
  • Website & SEO health
  • Social presence
  • Local visibility gaps
  • Competitive benchmarks

Key Features

🏆40M+ SMB database with local business focus

🏆AI-powered prospect discovery & pitch suggestions

🏆Advanced prospect filters (industry, spend, opening hours, digital gaps, reviews, location radius, etc.)

🏆Integrated sales pipeline to move leads

🏆Ability to prioritize leads with likelihood-to-buy and pitch angles.

🏆Export & integration with CRM/agency workflows (OS connectors)

🏆Custom search with AND/OR logic (e.g., restaurants in Chicago with 10-50 employees AND less than 20 reviews OR missing Google Business Profile)

🏆White-label client portal (once you close a deal, clients get a branded portal where you deliver actual services)

What Sets Synup Apart from Other SMB Prospecting Tools

  • Prospecting with context: Tools like Apollo and Openmart focus on contact data breadth (millions of records). Synup focuses on SMB intelligence depth. You’re not guessing pitch angles. The data gives it to you.
  • No dead-end leads: Prospect, pipeline, proposal, invoice, and service delivery all in the same platform with just one login.
  • Built for SMB Data: Synup’s 40M database wasn’t scraped from LinkedIn profiles of enterprise employees. It’s local-business-native from public data sources on local SMB businesses.
  • No credit gambling: Pricing is predictable. No credit-based models where you’re constantly calculating costs.

Benefits of Using Synup for SMB Leads

Shorter Sales Cycles

Less time wasted on enterprise contacts and faster list building for local campaigns. When you open conversations with specific, provable problems (backed by actual data), decision timelines are reduced.

Higher Conversion Rates

Digital audit intelligence means you are only calling businesses that actually need what you sell. Highly personalized pitch angles lead to higher reply rates and higher-quality conversations. 

Better Margins on Client Services

You can resell white-label marketing apps (listings, reviews, social) immediately at no extra platform costs. More revenue, controlled expenses.

Reduced Tool Sprawl

Consolidating prospecting, pipeline management, proposal generation, invoicing, and service delivery into one platform eliminates the monthly costs and team friction of managing 5-8 separate tools.

Predictable Revenue Growth

The integrated approach means you’re not just filling the top of the funnel, you’re moving prospects through the entire lifecycle with systematic follow-ups, automated proposals, and service delivery that keeps clients retained long-term.

Pros

✅SMB-focused data & digital gap signals

✅Integrated handoff from prospect to delivery & finance inside Synup OS

✅Transparent pricing without credit anxiety

✅ Informed pitching data and easy contact information

Cons

🚫May not be ideal for solo freelancers who just want a list

How to find SMB prospects with Synup OS

  1. Set up your ICP (industry/category, location, digital gaps).
  2. Use Prospect Search with advanced filters (such as business category, location, and GBP details) to generate a targeted list.
  1. Or use Leads AI prompts to auto-discover matching prospects.
  2. Save prospects to a list to reveal full contact data.
  1. Enrich and export your list to outreach sequences or Synup client onboarding.

‍
what_people_say:
__POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__

What Customers Say

“The customer service is outstanding, and they say their relationship with their clients is more important than the money. I can testify to that. They have gone above and beyond to assist and ensure that we have what we need in order to effectively use their platform. I love how simple it is to set up a business on Synup and how simple it is to manage the reviews and updates. The lead generation tool is a great way to grow your business and it is a very effective 'sales' demonstration for a prospect's lack of listing citations.”

- Review collected by and hosted on G2.com.
